post.description:
Upload any local file (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, TXT, CSV, HTML, JSON, …) and run one
or more detectors against its extracted text.

**`detectors`** is a JSON string containing an array of detector config objects.
Each object has the shape:
```json
{ "type": "<TYPE>", "enabled": true, "config": { ... } }
```

### Detector types & sample configs

| Type | What it finds |
|------|---------------|
| `SECRETS` | API keys, tokens, private keys |
| `PII` | Emails, SSNs, credit cards, phone numbers |
| `YARA` | Custom YARA rule matches |
| `BROKEN_LINKS` | Unreachable URLs in text |
| `CUSTOM` | User-defined pipelines (REGEX, GLiNER2, HuggingFace transformers) |

**Minimal — secrets only (all patterns):**
```json
[{"type":"SECRETS","enabled":true,"config":{}}]
```

**PII with specific patterns:**
```json
[{"type":"PII","enabled":true,"config":{"enabled_patterns":["email","credit_card","ssn","phone_number"],"confidence_threshold":0.8}}]
```

**Secrets + PII combined:**
```json
[
  {"type":"SECRETS","enabled":true,"config":{"enabled_patterns":["aws","github","stripe","generic_api_key"]}},
  {"type":"PII","enabled":true,"config":{"enabled_patterns":["email","ssn","credit_card"],"confidence_threshold":0.75}}
]
```

**Full scan — all detectors:**
```json
[
  {"type":"SECRETS","enabled":true,"config":{}},
  {"type":"PII","enabled":true,"config":{"confidence_threshold":0.7}},
  {"type":"BROKEN_LINKS","enabled":true,"config":{}}
]
```

detectors.description: JSON array of detector config objects

info.title: Classifyre API
info.description: Metadata ingestion and detection API for unstructured data sources. Supports WordPress, Slack, S3-Compatible Storage, Azure Blob Storage, Google Cloud Storage, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MSSQL, Oracle, Hive, Databricks, Snowflake, MongoDB, PowerBI, Tableau, Confluence, Jira, Service Desk, Notion, Email, and YouTube sources. Built-in detectors for secrets, PII, toxic content, image classification, broken links, and security threats.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of this source
description.example: Primary marketing blog, scanned nightly for leaked secrets

config.description: Configuration for the source (depends on type)

scheduleEnabled.description: Whether to enable a recurring schedule for this source

scheduleCron.description: 5-field cron expression (required when scheduleEnabled is true)

scheduleTimezone.description: IANA timezone for the cron schedule

description.example: Primary marketing blog, scanned nightly for leaked secrets

lastErrorMessage.description: Human-readable error message from the most recent failed run. Cleared on success.

message.example: Successfully connected to Slack workspace acme.
message.description: Human-friendly message about the test result.

timestamp.description: Timestamp emitted by the CLI test result.

source_type.description: Source type reported by the CLI test result.

running.description: Sources with RUNNING or PENDING runner status

total.description: Total sources matching the current filter

assetType.description: Catalog asset kind (file, image, page, comment, table, ...)

items.description: Page of result rows. Each row is a flat object keyed by column name.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page, or null when this is the last page. Pass it back as the `cursor` query param to fetch the next page.

status.description: Filter by one or more asset statuses

sourceTypes.description: Filter by one or more source types

customDetectorKey.description: Filter findings by custom detector keys

runnerId.description: Filter by one or more finding runner IDs

excludeFindings.description: When true, skip findings join and return assets with empty findings arrays

includeAssetsWithoutFindings.description: When true, include assets even if they have no findings matching findings filters

path.description: Human-readable source reference: 'schema.table, row N' for tabular, URL for web/Slack

description.description: Additional detail, e.g. column name where value was found

line.description: Line number (1-based) where the finding starts

column.description: Column number (1-based) where the finding starts

start.description: Character offset start within the content

end.description: Character offset end within the content

customDetectorId.description: Custom detector ID when detectorType is CUSTOM

customDetectorKey.description: Custom detector key when detectorType is CUSTOM

customDetectorName.description: Custom detector display name when detectorType is CUSTOM

ranking.description: Present when results were ordered by semantic or hybrid relevance

topAssetsLimit.description: Max rows for top assets by findings chart

topSourcesLimit.description: Max rows for top sources by asset volume chart

assets.description: Optional asset-level filters applied to metrics and charts

findings.description: Optional findings filters applied to "top assets by findings" chart

severityScore.description: Severity score used for visualization color mapping (1..5)

search.description: Case-insensitive text search across finding fields and related asset/source names

excludeIds.description: Finding UUIDs to exclude from results (e.g. already-attached findings)

assetType.description: Catalog asset kind of the parent asset

customDetectorId.description: Custom detector ID when detectorType is CUSTOM

customDetectorKey.description: Custom detector key when detectorType is CUSTOM

customDetectorName.description: Custom detector display name when detectorType is CUSTOM

count.description: Number of findings for this custom detector

runnerId.description: The runner ID for this ingestion batch

assets.description: Array of assets to ingest (validated against output.json schema)

finalizeRun.description: Whether this request should finalize the run immediately (defaults to true)

skipFindings.description: When true, skip all findings processing (create, update, resolve) for this batch. Useful for streaming ingestion where assets are pushed before detector results.

runnerId.description: The runner ID that should be finalized

seenHashes.description: Hashes observed during extraction for this run

samplingCursor.description: Opaque, source-defined AUTOMATIC sampling cursor to persist on the source for the next run. Omitted for non-AUTOMATIC strategies so the stored cursor is left unchanged.

aiProviderConfigId.description: AI provider credential ID backing this detector (LLM detectors only).

sourcesUsingCount.description: Number of sources currently selecting this detector

sourcesWithFindingsCount.description: Number of distinct sources where this detector produced findings

recentSourceNames.description: Recent source names using this detector

sourcesUsing.description: Sources using this detector with their id and name

key.description: Stable key override. If omitted, generated from name.

description.example: Extracts order IDs, amounts, and intent from support tickets

isActive.description: Whether this detector can be selected in sources

aiProviderConfigId.description: AI provider credential ID. Required for LLM (AI) detectors; the API resolves and injects the decrypted provider config at scan time.

pipelineSchema.description: Pipeline schema defining the detector behaviour (type: GLINER2 | REGEX | LLM | TEXT_CLASSIFICATION | IMAGE_CLASSIFICATION | OBJECT_DETECTION)

lineNumber.description: 1-based line number in the uploaded file when available

missingLabel.description: Rows skipped because label cell was empty

missingText.description: Rows skipped because text cell was empty

availableColumns.description: All column headers found in the file (csv/tsv only)

detectedLabelColumn.description: Column header auto-detected as the label column

detectedTextColumn.description: Column header auto-detected as the text column

skippedReasons.description: Breakdown of why rows were skipped

key.description: Stable key override. If omitted, generated from name.

description.example: Extracts order IDs, amounts, and intent from support tickets

isActive.description: Whether this detector can be selected in sources

aiProviderConfigId.description: AI provider credential ID. Required for LLM (AI) detectors; the API resolves and injects the decrypted provider config at scan time.

pipelineSchema.description: Pipeline schema defining the detector behaviour (type: GLINER2 | REGEX | LLM | TEXT_CLASSIFICATION | IMAGE_CLASSIFICATION | OBJECT_DETECTION)

text.description: Context text containing the entity or to classify

value.description: Specific entity value (span text) — required for NER fine-tuning. Omit for classification.

accepted.description: true = positive example, false = negative / false-positive

source.description: Source filename the example came from

clearExisting.description: When true, delete all existing examples before saving

sourceId.description: Optional source ID to train using only feedback/examples from one source

path.description: Human-readable source reference: 'schema.table, row N' for tabular, URL for web/Slack

description.description: Additional detail, e.g. column name where value was found

customDetectorId.description: Custom detector ID when detectorType is CUSTOM

customDetectorKey.description: Custom detector key when detectorType is CUSTOM

customDetectorName.description: Custom detector display name when detectorType is CUSTOM

ids.description: Explicit finding IDs to update. Use either ids or filters, not both.

filters.description: Filter to update all matching findings (select-all mode).

comment.description: Comment applied to all updated findings

ids.description: IDs of updated findings (empty for filter-mode updates)

assetType.description: Catalog asset kind of the parent asset

aiEnabled.description: When false, AI assistant features are disabled instance-wide.

mcpEnabled.description: When false, the MCP endpoint is disabled instance-wide.

timezone.description: Default IANA timezone used for date/time rendering. Use "AUTOMATIC" to detect from browser.

aiProviderConfigId.description: Id of the AI provider credential used as the instance-wide default. Null when unset.

autopilotInquiryEnabled.description: When true, the autopilot inquiry agent manages inquiries automatically after scans.

autopilotInquiryDesired.description: Operator guidance for the inquiry agent: what is desired / worth investigating.

autopilotInquirySearchable.description: Operator guidance for the inquiry agent: what is searchable in this instance.

autopilotCaseEnabled.description: When true, the autopilot case agent manages investigation cases automatically after scans.

autopilotCaseGuidance.description: Operator guidance for the case agent.

autopilotConfigEnabled.description: When true, the config-tuning agent may change editable source config.

autopilotConfigGuidance.description: Operator guidance for the config-tuning agent.

autopilotDetectorEnabled.description: When true, the detector-authoring agent may create/train detectors.

autopilotDetectorGuidance.description: Operator guidance for the detector-authoring agent.

autopilotEscalationEnabled.description: When true, the escalation agent may raise operator notifications for high-severity cases.

autopilotEscalationGuidance.description: Operator guidance for the escalation agent.

autopilotMcpEnabled.description: When true, the harness may call tools from connected external MCP servers.

demoMode.description: Read-only. When true, the instance runs in demo mode and all mutating operations are rejected.

hfTokenSet.description: Read-only. Whether a user-configured Hugging Face token is stored (encrypted at rest).

hfTokenInstanceSet.description: Read-only. Whether an instance-level HF_TOKEN is configured via Kubernetes Secret. When true, the instance token takes priority over any user-configured token.

aiEnabled.description: When false, AI assistant features are disabled instance-wide.

mcpEnabled.description: When false, the MCP endpoint is disabled instance-wide.

timezone.description: Default IANA timezone used for date/time rendering.

aiProviderConfigId.description: Id of the AI provider credential to use as the instance-wide default. Pass null or an empty string to clear the selection.

autopilotInquiryEnabled.description: When true, the autopilot inquiry agent manages inquiries automatically after scans.

autopilotInquiryDesired.description: Operator guidance for the inquiry agent: what is desired / worth investigating.

autopilotInquirySearchable.description: Operator guidance for the inquiry agent: what is searchable in this instance.

autopilotCaseEnabled.description: When true, the autopilot case agent manages investigation cases automatically after scans.

autopilotCaseGuidance.description: Operator guidance for the case agent.

autopilotConfigEnabled.description: When true, the config-tuning agent may change editable source config (detectors, sampling, optional, resources) — never the base connection.

autopilotConfigGuidance.description: Operator guidance for the config-tuning agent.

autopilotDetectorEnabled.description: When true, the detector-authoring agent may create and train custom detectors.

autopilotDetectorGuidance.description: Operator guidance for the detector-authoring agent.

autopilotEscalationEnabled.description: When true, the escalation agent may raise operator notifications for high-severity cases.

autopilotEscalationGuidance.description: Operator guidance for the escalation agent.

autopilotMcpEnabled.description: When true, the harness may call tools from connected external MCP servers.

hfToken.description: Hugging Face token to set. Pass a token value to store (encrypted at rest). Pass null or an empty string to clear the stored token. Ignored when an instance-level HF_TOKEN is configured.

description.example: Create, validate, update, delete, and run ingestion sources from MCP.

example: Validate source configs against JSON Schema

description.example: Guide an MCP client to propose regex, classifier, or entity detector configs before training.

endpointPath.description: Relative MCP endpoint path exposed by the API server.

transport.description: Transport mode exposed by the endpoint.

authScheme.description: Authorization scheme expected by the MCP endpoint.

tokenPrefix.description: Static token prefix generated by the API.

authHeaderExample.description: Authorization header example for MCP clients.

example: Generate one token per MCP client or workspace.
Store tokens in a secret manager, not in plain text config files.
Rotate by creating a replacement token, then revoke the old one.
Tokens are hashed at rest and shown only once after creation.

name.description: Parameter name as sent in the tool call arguments.

type.description: JSON Schema type of the parameter (e.g. string, integer).

required.description: Whether the parameter is required by the tool.

description.description: Human-readable description sourced from the tool schema.
description.example: Source type id from list_source_types, e.g. POSTGRESQL

format.description: Format hint from the schema, when present.

enumValues.description: Allowed enum values, when the parameter is an enum.

name.description: Programmatic tool name used in MCP tools/call requests.

title.description: Human-friendly title registered with the tool.

description.description: Tool description registered with the MCP server.
description.example: List runs for a single source.

groupId.description: Capability group id this tool belongs to.

groupTitle.description: Capability group title this tool belongs to.

readOnly.description: Tool reads state only and never mutates data.

idempotent.description: Tool is idempotent — repeat calls have the same effect.

parameters.description: Flattened top-level input parameters, from the real schema.

returnsJson.description: Whether the tool returns a JSON result payload. All Classifyre tools return structured JSON.

id.description: Stable public token identifier embedded in the token value.

tokenPreview.description: Masked token preview shown in settings after creation.

isActive.description: Whether the token can currently authorize MCP requests.

revokedAt.description: Revocation timestamp, if the token has been disabled.

name.description: Human-readable label for this MCP access token.

id.description: Stable public token identifier embedded in the token value.

tokenPreview.description: Masked token preview shown in settings after creation.

isActive.description: Whether the token can currently authorize MCP requests.

revokedAt.description: Revocation timestamp, if the token has been disabled.

plainTextToken.description: Full plaintext bearer token returned once at creation time. It is never returned again.

name.description: Updated display name for the token.

isActive.description: When false, the token is revoked and can no longer authorize MCP requests.

hasApiKey.description: Whether an API key is currently stored.

apiKeyPreview.description: Masked preview of the stored API key (first 4 + last 4 chars). Null when no key is set.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible endpoints. Null for managed providers.

contextSize.description: Context window size in tokens. Null when unspecified.

supportsVision.description: Whether the provider/model accepts image/PDF (vision) input. When true, detectors using this credential send rendered file images to the model instead of extracted text.

inputCostPerMTok.description: Cost in USD per 1M input tokens. Null when pricing is not configured.

outputCostPerMTok.description: Cost in USD per 1M output tokens. Null when pricing is not configured.

apiKey.description: Plaintext API key. Sent once, stored encrypted.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible providers. Ignored for CLAUDE and GEMINI.

supportsVision.description: Whether the provider/model accepts image/PDF (vision) input. Defaults to false.

inputCostPerMTok.description: Optional cost in USD per 1M input tokens (enables cost estimates on autopilot runs).

outputCostPerMTok.description: Optional cost in USD per 1M output tokens (enables cost estimates on autopilot runs).

apiKey.description: Plaintext API key. Sent once, stored encrypted. Pass an empty string to clear the key.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible providers. Ignored for CLAUDE and GEMINI.

supportsVision.description: Whether the provider/model accepts image/PDF (vision) input. Defaults to false.

inputCostPerMTok.description: Cost in USD per 1M input tokens. Pass null to clear the price.

outputCostPerMTok.description: Cost in USD per 1M output tokens. Pass null to clear the price.

inquiryIds.description: Link these questions to the new case (guides)

customDetectorName.description: Human-readable name for custom detectors (snapshotted at attach time)

matchedContent.description: Matched content snippet snapshotted from the finding at attach time

newMatchCount.description: Matches that appeared since the inquiry was last viewed

aiMode.description: AI autopilot mode for this case. INHERIT follows the instance setting; OBSERVE_ONLY blocks autopilot mutations.

note.description: Analyst note. Pass null or empty string to clear.

findingIds.description: Finding UUIDs to attach as case evidence

attached.description: Findings newly attached to the case

note.description: Analyst note. Pass null or empty string to clear.

conclusion.description: Final conclusion — required to close the case

archivedInquiries.description: Linked inquiries archived by closing this case

findingIds.description: Specific finding IDs (omit = all current matches)

pulled.description: Number of findings pulled into the case

depth.description: Hop distance from the seed/case evidence

customDetectorName.description: For CUSTOM findings: the custom detector display name

matchedContent.description: For finding nodes: truncated matched text

assetName.description: For finding nodes: name of the parent asset

assetId.description: For finding nodes: parent asset id

hypothesisIds.description: Hypothesis IDs this node is directly affiliated with (as evidence or case finding)

caseFindingId.description: For finding nodes: the CaseFinding record ID (used to unlink)

missing.description: True when the underlying row no longer exists

crossHypothesis.description: True when this edge bridges nodes affiliated with different hypotheses

truncated.description: True when the node cap was hit and the graph is partial

matchAllSources.description: Match findings from any source (ignores sourceIds)

findingValueRegex.description: Regex patterns matched against matchedContent (the detected value). Empty = any.

newMatchCount.description: Matches that appeared since you last viewed

matchAllSources.description: Match findings from any source (ignores sourceIds)

findingValueRegex.description: Regex patterns matched against matchedContent (the detected value). Empty = any.

isNew.description: Appeared since the question was last viewed

ranking.description: Evidence ranking (importance, quality, reasons) when the finding has been analyzed

findingTypes.description: Distinct finding types (optionally scoped to selected sources)

matchAllSources.description: Match findings from any source (ignores sourceIds)

findingValueRegex.description: Regex patterns matched against matchedContent (the detected value). Empty = any.

aiMode.description: AI autopilot mode for this inquiry. INHERIT follows the instance setting; OBSERVE_ONLY blocks autopilot mutations.

newCount.description: New matches after filters (appeared since last seen)

title.description: Short display title (hypothesis name or discussion topic)

relationTypes.description: Restrict traversal to these relation types

fromId.description: Source entity UUID (use fromId OR fromHash)

fromHash.description: Source asset hash (alternative to fromId — API resolves to UUID)

toId.description: Target entity UUID (use toId OR toHash)

toHash.description: Target asset hash (alternative to toId — API resolves to UUID)

relationType.description: Relation type: OWNS | ACCESSED | READS | WRITES | GENERATED_FROM | EXPORTED_TO | ATTACHED_TO | SENT_TO | EXECUTED | MENTIONS | CONTAINS | REFERENCES

edgeCount.description: Total edges present after the rebuild

inUse.description: All relation types in use, sorted by frequency

relationType.description: Relation type — free-form string (e.g. "READS", "SENT_TO", "my custom link")
New relation type label for this edge

botTokenPreview.description: Masked preview of the stored bot token (never the raw value).

appTokenPreview.description: Masked preview of the Slack app-level token, if stored.

capabilityGroups.description: MCP capability group ids the bot may use (see MCP overview). Empty = all groups.

agentKinds.description: Autopilot agent kinds the bot may steer. Empty = all steerable kinds.

allowMutations.description: When false, every mutating tool is recorded observe-only and never executed.

botToken.description: Bot token (Telegram BotFather token, or Slack bot token xoxb-…). Sent once, stored encrypted.

appToken.description: Slack app-level token (xapp-…) for Socket Mode. Required for Slack bots.

botToken.description: New bot token. Omit (or send empty) to keep the stored one.

appToken.description: New Slack app token. Omit (or send empty) to keep the stored one.

code.description: Stable event code for client-side translation (e.g. slackMention).

params.description: Values to interpolate into the translated event text.

message.description: English fallback text, pre-rendered from code + params.

running.description: Whether a live connector currently runs for this bot.

processing.description: Whether an agent turn is currently running (a reply is being worked on).

lastEventAt.description: When the connector last received a platform message.

eventsReceived.description: Messages received since the connector started.

repliesSent.description: Replies posted since the connector started.

activity.description: Most recent connector activity, newest first (in-memory).

id.description: Stable check id: botToken, appToken or polling.

code.description: Stable result code for client-side translation (e.g. slackAuthenticated).

params.description: Values to interpolate into the translated result text.

detail.description: English fallback text, pre-rendered from code + params.

message.description: The message to send to the bot, as if typed in the chat.

reply.description: The bot reply, or null when the message was ignored (duplicate/empty).

id.description: Existing row ID when editing or renaming

author.description: Operator identity recorded as verifiedBy. Defaults to "operator".

merged.description: True when an agent proposal only merged aliases into an operator-owned term

verifiedBy.description: Operator identity recorded as verifiedBy. Defaults to "operator".

rationale.description: Why this finding might belong in the case

assetsOutOfScope.description: Assets absent from this run but retained because they were ingested under a different source scope. Their findings remain OPEN. A non-zero value means the scope moved and those assets are no longer covered.

scopeFingerprint.description: Fingerprint of the scope-determining config this run covered. Runs sharing a fingerprint are directly comparable.

totalFindings.description: Findings currently associated with this run — created, re-detected, or resolved by it. NOT a count of new discoveries: after reconciliation it is closer to the source's open set as of this run. Use findingsCreated for what this run actually found that was new.

findingsCreated.description: Findings first seen by this run.

findingsResolved.description: Previously open findings resolved by this run.

findingsRetained.description: Previously known findings re-detected and retained as current by this run.

assetsWithoutText.description: Assets that should have carried text but yielded none — typically OCR or transcription returning empty. These are not errors: the asset ingested fine, but its content was never read, so any detector result for it covers nothing. Read alongside assetsUnchanged before trusting a run: a high value means the corpus is largely unscanned.

assetHashes.description: Asset hashes to register as PENDING

findingsByDetector.description: Finding counts per detector: { [detectorType]: { total, critical?, high?, … } }

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor (i:N = skip N entries)

sortOrder.description: asc = oldest first (cursor-based), desc = newest first (index-based)

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor for this entry
Cursor for the next page (i:N format)

search.description: Case-insensitive text search across runner id, source name/type, triggeredBy, and error message

assetsOutOfScope.description: Assets absent from this run but retained because they were ingested under a different source scope. Their findings remain OPEN. A non-zero value means the scope moved and those assets are no longer covered.

scopeFingerprint.description: Fingerprint of the scope-determining config this run covered. Runs sharing a fingerprint are directly comparable.

totalFindings.description: Findings currently associated with this run — created, re-detected, or resolved by it. NOT a count of new discoveries: after reconciliation it is closer to the source's open set as of this run. Use findingsCreated for what this run actually found that was new.

findingsCreated.description: Findings first seen by this run.

findingsResolved.description: Previously open findings resolved by this run.

findingsRetained.description: Previously known findings re-detected and retained as current by this run.

assetsWithoutText.description: Assets that should have carried text but yielded none — typically OCR or transcription returning empty. These are not errors: the asset ingested fine, but its content was never read, so any detector result for it covers nothing. Read alongside assetsUnchanged before trusting a run: a high value means the corpus is largely unscanned.

topSourcesLimit.description: Max rows for top sources chart

search.description: Case-insensitive text search across asset filename, hash, or error message

metadata.description: Source-specific asset metadata (denormalized from the asset)

fileType.description: Raw MIME type detected by the CLI (e.g. "application/pdf")

contentType.description: Internal content classification derived from the MIME type

s3Key.description: S3 object key for the uploaded file (null when S3 is not configured)

contentHash.description: SHA-256 content hash of the uploaded file (used for duplicate detection)

detectors.description: Array of detector config objects to use for the new run

skipDuplicateCheck.description: When true, skip the duplicate-file check and create a new run even if an identical file exists

instruction.description: What the agents should pay attention to in this cycle (highest-priority prompt section).

sourceId.description: Limit the review to one source. Omit to review all sources.

agentKinds.description: Which agents to run. Pipeline agents (INQUIRY, CASE, CONFIG, DETECTOR_AUTHOR, ESCALATION) run in canonical order as one chained cycle; DREAM (memory consolidation, steered by instruction) and DUPLICATES (fingerprint consolidation, deterministic — instruction ignored) run as their own jobs. Omit to run the full pipeline. Forced to [CASE] when caseId is set.

caseId.description: Focus the case agent on ONE case: it receives the full case detail (hypotheses, evidence, findings, edges) and can connect/disconnect edges, build evidence paths and create/update hypotheses with supporting evidence — steered by the instruction.

cycleKey.description: Cycle identity — runs will carry this cycleKey

memoryCount.description: Long-lived memory entries the agent has learned

briefVersion.description: Current system brief version (0 = none yet)

lastActivityAt.description: When the autopilot last did anything

runsByKind.description: Run counts grouped by agent kind

tokensLast24h.description: LLM tokens (in + out) consumed by autopilot runs in the last 24h. Scoped to the harness — assistant chat and LLM detectors are not metered here.

costLast24h.description: Estimated autopilot LLM cost (USD) of the last 24h. Null when no run carries pricing.

costUsd.description: Estimated cost (USD); null when no run that day was priced

avgDurationMs.description: Mean wall-clock duration (ms) of finished runs in range

buckets.description: Per-day, per-agent token/cost buckets (UTC days, ascending)

pricingConfigured.description: True when the default AI provider has per-MTok prices configured (cost charts are meaningful)

source.description: Origin of the tool: "builtin" (native toolset) or "mcp" (external server)

goal.description: The goal/system-prompt that frames the mission

allowedTools.description: Tool names this mission may call

enabled.description: Whether the agent runs on scan cycles

enableable.description: False when the agent has no enable toggle (DREAM)

mcpToolNames.description: MCP tools this agent receives via server scoping (read-only)

customized.description: True when config differs from factory defaults

enabled.description: Enable/disable the agent on scan cycles

goal.description: Goal override; empty/null resets to factory default

maxIterations.description: Iteration budget override (1–50); null resets to default

toolNames.description: Assigned built-in tool names; null resets to the factory toolset

status.description: ok = satisfied, todo = action recommended, info = neutral

content.description: Model-authored overview narrative (the only free-form, editable slot).

glossary.description: Glossary terms, composed from agent memory (read-only).

topics.description: Topic → entity/inquiry maps, composed from memory (read-only).

gaps.description: What's been tried / known gaps (detector insights, precedents).

setup.description: Server-derived setup checklist for standing up the instance.

content.description: Full replacement narrative for the system brief

caseId.description: Case this run is focused on (case-targeted manual runs)

inputTokens.description: LLM input (prompt) tokens consumed by the run

costUsd.description: Estimated cost in USD (provider per-MTok prices at recording time). Null when no pricing is configured.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration in ms (running runs measure up to now). Null before the run starts.

rationale.description: Why the agent made (or skipped) this change

caseId.description: Case this run is focused on (case-targeted manual runs)

inputTokens.description: LLM input (prompt) tokens consumed by the run

costUsd.description: Estimated cost in USD (provider per-MTok prices at recording time). Null when no pricing is configured.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration in ms (running runs measure up to now). Null before the run starts.

payload.description: Structured detail — raw model output, prompt sizes, errors

hasHeaders.description: Whether auth headers are stored (values hidden)

slug.description: Stable slug; generated from name if omitted

headers.description: http: auth headers (stored encrypted, never returned)

trusted.description: Trusted servers may run mutating tools; untrusted are observe-only

agentKinds.description: Missions allowed to use these tools. Empty = all missions.

toolAllowlist.description: Discovered tool names to expose. Empty = all.

headers.description: Replace auth headers; pass null/empty to clear

truncated.description: True when the node cap was hit and the graph is partial

inUse.description: Whether the label currently appears in the data

mode.description: value = exact normalized value; regex = pattern on value; label = ignore the whole label

label.description: Label scope (or the excluded label when mode=label)

defaultWeight.description: Fallback weight for any unlisted label

relatedMin.description: Min weighted match to record a related link (0-1)

duplicateMin.description: Min weighted match for a likely duplicate (0-1)

exclusions.description: Full replacement list of exclusion rules

caseId.description: Existing case to extend; omit to create one

title.description: Title for a newly created case

recalibrationScheduled.description: A recalibration pass is queued (debounced) but not yet running

sourceCount.description: Distinct sources the cluster spans (>1 = cross-source)

assetIds.description: Assets containing the clustered findings (up to 50)
